name: Podcast from Text
description: Polish a text input into a spoken podcast script and convert to audio

config.userPrompt:
Transform the notes or text below into a polished, natural spoken podcast script.
Requirements:
- 5 to 10 short paragraphs, each 2-4 sentences.
- Open with a warm 1-sentence host intro.
- Keep the tone conversational and engaging, not formal.
- Preserve all key facts, names, and dates from the source.
- End with a brief sign-off (1 sentence).
- Return plain text only — no markdown headings, bullets, asterisks, or code fences.

SOURCE TEXT:
{{INPUT}}

config.notifyBody: Your podcast is ready to play.
